chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C.P. No.D-6414,6415, 6416, 6417 of 2024 _______________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge _______________________________________________________ 1.For order on office objection 2.For hearing of CMA No.13529/2025 3.For hearing of CMA No.6908/2025 4.For hearing of CMA No.28657/2024 5.For hearing of CMA No.28658/2024 6.For hearing of main case 14.01.2026 Mr. Ravi Pinjani, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Akram Tariq, Advocate for the Respondent No.1 ------------------------- Both the learned counsel for the parties have agreed for disposal of these petitions with the consent that the Chairman, Respondent No.1/Evacuee Trust Property Board, shall hear the parties and pass a reasoned and speaking order strictly on merits within a period of three months from the date of receipt of this order. It is further directed that the issue of limitation shall not come in the way of the petitioners, and the appeal/case of the petitioners shall not be dismissed merely on technical grounds, including limitation, but shall be decided purely on merits in accordance with law. In the intervening period, the petitioners shall not be dispossessed from the subject property. Office to place copy hereof in connected petitions listed above. JUDGE JUDGE Aadil Arab
